_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: Wound closure assay indicated a 40–50% decrease in migration in ST88-14 and S462 cells after treatment with APX3330
details: 40-50% decrease in migration after treatment with APX3330 in wound closure assay
